items.title: [正面] Its a good game. Otherwise, the only bad thing is ...
items.summary: Its a good game. Otherwise, the only bad thing is their language and you cannot scroll down when they're talking too much, the text will cut out on down below whichs weird for me. i hope in future instead putting an a.i translator towards the games, they will put a better one neither manually nor better translator bot (:D i love jenkins is identified as women and the bots still called him instead of her)
